title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.
body_text: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. frontmatter.title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.
frontmatter.summary: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. The JSON MUST validate against this Pydantic JSON Schema for KnowledgeGraph: { "$defs": { "Edge": { "description": "Edge in a knowledge graph.", "properties": { "source_node_id": { "title": "Source Node Id", "type": "string" }, "target_node_id": { "title": "Target Node Id", "type": "string" }, "relationship_name": { "title": "Relationship Name", "type": "string" }, "properties": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "object" }, { "type": "null" } ], "default": null, "description": "A dictionary of properties associated with the edge.", "title": "Properties" } }, "required": [ "source_node_id", "target_node_id", "relationship_name" ], "title": "Edge", "type": "object" }, "Node": { "description": "Node in a knowledge graph.", "properties": { "id": { "title": "Id", "type": "string" }, "name": { "title": "Name", "type": "string" }, "type": { "title": "Type", "type": "string" }, "description": { "title": "Description", "type": "string" }, "properties": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "object" }, { "type": "null" } ], "default": null, "description": "A dictionary of properties associated with th
commands_run:
python - <<'PY'
import json
from collections import OrderedDict
path='output/cognee_qwen_embedding_full_bundle/edges.jsonl'

def parse_node(node_id):
    parts=node_id.split(':')
    raw_type=parts[0] if parts else 'Entity'
    raw_name=':'.join(parts[1:]) if len(parts)>1 else node_id
    if ':' in raw_name:
        name=raw_name.rsplit(':',1)[0]
    else:
        name=raw_name
    name=name.replace('-', ' ').strip() or node_id
    type_map={
        'Paper':'Document',
        'ResearchField':'Concept',
        'ResearchTopic':'Concept',
        'EvidenceSpan':'Document',
        'Claim':'Claim',
        'PerformanceClaim':'Claim',
        'CausalClaim':'Claim',
        'MethodologicalConcept':'Concept',
        'ApproachFamily':'Concept',
        'Dataset':'Organization',
        'Benchmark':'Concept',
        'Task':'Concept',
        'Model':'Product',
        'Person':'Person',
        'Organization':'Organization',
        'Date':'Date',
    }
    node_type=type_map.get(raw_type, 'Concept')
    desc_map={
        'Paper':'Document node inferred from the edge list.',
        'ResearchField':'Research field referenced in the edge list.',
        'ResearchTopic':'Research topic referenced in the edge list.',
        'EvidenceSpan':'Evidence span referenced in the edge list.',
        'Claim':'Claim referenced in the edge list.',
        'PerformanceClaim':'Performance claim referenced in the edge list.',
        'CausalClaim':'Causal claim referenced in the edge list.',
        'MethodologicalConcept':'Methodological concept referenced in the edge list.',
        'ApproachFamily':'Approach family referenced in the edge list.',
        'Dataset':'Dataset referenced in the edge list.',
        'Benchmark':'Benchmark referenced in the edge list.',
        'Task':'Task referenced in the edge list.',
        'Model':'Model referenced in the edge list.',
        'Person':'Person referenced in the edge list.',
        'Organization':'Organization referenced in the edge list.',
        'Date':'Date referenced in the edge list.',
    }
    desc=desc_map.get(raw_type, 'Entity referenced in the edge list.')
    props={'source_label': raw_type}
    return {'id': node_id, 'name': name, 'type': node_type, 'description': desc, 'properties': props}

nodes=OrderedDict()
edges=[]
with open(path) as f:
    for line in f:
        obj=json.loads(line)
        for nid in (obj['source_id'], obj['target_id']):
            nodes.setdefault(nid, parse_node(nid))
        props={}
        if obj.get('evidence') is not None:
            props['evidence']=obj['evidence']
        if obj.get('metadata') not in (None, {}):
            props['metadata']=obj['metadata']
        edge={
            'source_node_id': obj['source_id'],
            'target_node_id': obj['target_id'],
            'relationship_name': obj['relationship'],
            'properties': props or None,
        }
        edges.append(edge)
kg={'nodes': list(nodes.values()), 'edges': edges}
print(json.dumps({'node_count':len(nodes),'edge_count':len(edges)}))
print(json.dumps(kg, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(',', ':')))
PY
